title: Arena Duel
body:
This mod pack is a gun battle arena. ROtating maps, with RTP to arena. Join, shoot, earn money, buy upgrades, pvp more!

You start in what looks like a gun dojo. 

Type /shops or shift + f to get into the shop menu. Each player starts with 5000.
You run straight into the arena, and the maps will rotate weekly.

Enjoy!

Join us on discord!!!!
